---
title: "Cuadro 3 y Figura - Egresos por Paciente"
author: "Rodolfo Tasso"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

source("../../R/cargar_funciones.R")
load("../../BBDD_homologados.RData")
```

```{r calcular}
egresos_pac <- datos_homologados %>%
  filter(!is.na(RUN)) %>%
  count(RUN, name = "n_egresos")

stats <- egresos_pac %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Total_egresos = sum(n_egresos),
    Media = mean(n_egresos),
    DE = sd(n_egresos),
    Mediana = median(n_egresos),
    RIC = IQR(n_egresos),
    P75 = quantile(n_egresos, 0.75),
    P90 = quantile(n_egresos, 0.90),
    P95 = quantile(n_egresos, 0.95),
    P99 = quantile(n_egresos, 0.99),
    Max = max(n_egresos)
  )

# Frecuencias por categoria
freq <- egresos_pac %>%
  mutate(
    categoria = case_when(
      n_egresos == 1 ~ "1",
      n_egresos == 2 ~ "2",
      n_egresos == 3 ~ "3",
      n_egresos >= 4 & n_egresos <= 5 ~ "4-5",
      n_egresos >= 6 & n_egresos <= 10 ~ "6-10",
      n_egresos >= 11 & n_egresos <= 50 ~ "11-50",
      n_egresos >= 51 & n_egresos <= 100 ~ "51-100",
      n_egresos > 100 ~ ">100"
    ),
    categoria = factor(categoria, levels = c(
      "1", "2", "3", "4-5", "6-10", "11-50", "51-100", ">100"
    ))
  ) %>%
  count(categoria, name = "n_pacientes") %>%
  mutate(
    porcentaje = n_pacientes / sum(n_pacientes) * 100,
    acumulado = cumsum(porcentaje)
  )
```

# Cuadro 3

```{r cuadro3}
cuadro_data <- tibble(
  Estadistico = c(
    "Pacientes \u00fanicos, n",
    "Total de egresos hospitalarios, n",
    "Egresos por paciente, media (DE)",
    "Egresos por paciente, mediana (RIC)",
    "Pacientes con \u22645 egresos, n (%)",
    "Pacientes con 6-10 egresos, n (%)",
    "Pacientes con 11-100 egresos, n (%)",
    "Pacientes con >100 egresos, n (%)",
    "M\u00e1ximo de egresos por paciente"
  ),
  Valor = c(
    format(stats$N, big.mark = "."),
    format(stats$Total_egresos, big.mark = "."),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", stats$Media, stats$DE),
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f)", stats$Mediana, stats$RIC),
    sprintf("%s (%.1f)",
            format(sum(freq$n_pacientes[freq$categoria %in% c("1","2","3","4-5")]),
                   big.mark = "."),
            sum(freq$porcentaje[freq$categoria %in% c("1","2","3","4-5")])),
    sprintf("%s (%.1f)",
            format(freq$n_pacientes[freq$categoria == "6-10"], big.mark = "."),
            freq$porcentaje[freq$categoria == "6-10"]),
    sprintf("%s (%.2f)",
            format(sum(freq$n_pacientes[freq$categoria %in% c("11-50","51-100")]),
                   big.mark = "."),
            sum(freq$porcentaje[freq$categoria %in% c("11-50","51-100")])),
    sprintf("%s (%.4f)",
            format(freq$n_pacientes[freq$categoria == ">100"], big.mark = "."),
            freq$porcentaje[freq$categoria == ">100"]),
    format(stats$Max, big.mark = ".")
  )
)

ft <- flextable(cuadro_data) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Estadistico = "Egresos por paciente",
    Valor = "Valor"
  ) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") %>%
  width(j = 1, width = 3.5) %>%
  width(j = 2, width = 2) %>%
  align(j = 2, align = "right", part = "body") %>%
  align(j = 2, align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  bold(i = c(3, 4), part = "body") %>%
  hline(i = 4, part = "body") %>%
  add_footer_lines(
    "Cuadro 3. Distribuci\u00f3n de egresos hospitalarios por paciente \u00fanico. Chile, 2010-2022. DE: desviaci\u00f3n est\u00e1ndar; RIC: rango intercuart\u00edlico. La elevada dispersi\u00f3n (DE=66,62 frente a una media de 2,17 y mediana de 1) se explica por la marcada asimetr\u00eda de la distribuci\u00f3n: la mayor\u00eda de los pacientes registr\u00f3 una \u00fanica hospitalizaci\u00f3n, mientras que un peque\u00f1o grupo con hospitalizaciones cr\u00f3nicas recurrentes concentra los valores extremos. Fuente: DEIS, MINSAL. Elaboraci\u00f3n propia."
  ) %>%
  fontsize(size = 8, part = "footer")

ft
```

```{r guardar_cuadro3}
guardar_tabla_png(ft, "cuadro3_descriptivo_egresos",
                  dir_salida = "../../output_qmd")

save_as_docx(
  "Cuadro 3" = ft,
  path = "../../resultados_tesis/final_resultados/Cuadro_3_Descriptivo_Egresos.docx",
  pr_section = officer::prop_section(page_size = officer::page_size(orient = "portrait"))
)
cat("\n\u2713 Tabla guardada en: resultados_tesis/final_resultados/Cuadro_3_Descriptivo_Egresos.docx\n")
```

# Figura: Distribucion de egresos por paciente

```{r figura, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, dpi=300}
# Datos para el grafico
plot_data <- freq %>%
  mutate(
    etiqueta_n = format(n_pacientes, big.mark = "."),
    etiqueta_pct = sprintf("%.1f%%", porcentaje),
    etiqueta = paste0(etiqueta_n, "\n(", etiqueta_pct, ")")
  )

# Colores: gradiente que muestra la concentracion vs la cola
colores <- c(
  "1" = "#1a5276",
  "2" = "#2471a3",
  "3" = "#2e86c1",
  "4-5" = "#5dade2",
  "6-10" = "#aed6f1",
  "11-50" = "#f0b27a",
  "51-100" = "#e67e22",
  ">100" = "#c0392b"
)

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = categoria, y = n_pacientes, fill = categoria)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = etiqueta),
    vjust = -0.3, size = 3, lineheight = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colores) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))
  ) +
  # Anotacion con estadisticos
  annotate(
    "label", x = 7, y = max(plot_data$n_pacientes) * 0.75,
    label = paste0(
      "Mediana = 1 egreso\n",
      "Media = 2,17 egresos\n",
      "DE = 66,62\n",
      "M\u00e1x = ", format(stats$Max, big.mark = "."), " egresos"
    ),
    hjust = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "italic",
    lineheight = 1.3, fill = "white", alpha = 0.9,
    label.size = 0.3
  ) +
  # Linea de corte P95
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 4.5, xend = 4.5,
    y = 0, yend = max(plot_data$n_pacientes) * 0.55,
    linetype = "dashed", color = "#e74c3c", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 4.7, y = max(plot_data$n_pacientes) * 0.57,
    label = "P95: 95,2% de pacientes\ntiene \u22645 egresos",
    hjust = 0, size = 2.8, color = "#e74c3c", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "N\u00famero de egresos hospitalarios por paciente",
    y = "N\u00famero de pacientes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(15, 20, 10, 10)
  )

p
```

```{r guardar_figura}
guardar_multiformato(p, "figura_distribucion_egresos",
                     ancho = 10, alto = 6, dpi = 300,
                     dir_salida = "../../output_qmd")
```
